supersedes: vc_master_formulations_v2_rev2.json (which superseded v2_rev1 via #145 Amino Acid Matrix+ addition)

products_removed.reason: Too close to other Base Formulations products per Gary 2026-05-02
Too close to other Advanced Formulas products per Gary 2026-05-02

summary: 2 products removed: aptigen-complex from base-formulations (15 ingredient rows), neuroaxis-plus from advanced-formulas (17 ingredient rows). 0 added/changed. neurocalm-bh4-complex was never in canonical (phantom row only in production); deleted from production via 144v2_remove_neurocalm_bh4_complex but no canonical change. Resulting v2_rev3 product count: 62 (down from v2_rev2 at 64 which included #145 Amino Acid Matrix+ addition). Total ingredient row count drops by 32. v2_rev2 canonical preserved at scripts/145/ never modified.

production_state_at_promotion.note_on_spec_count_discrepancy: Spec §7 expected base=8 + advanced=18 + total=62; actual base=9 + advanced=17 because spec assumed pre-Phase-L state. NeuroCalm+ was moved base→advanced by Phase L (not yet reflected in spec), and NeuroAxis+ was already inactive pre-#142e via 2026-05-01 soft-deactivate. Net total non-peptide active=70 vs spec-implied 62 because canonical drops 2 (aptigen + neuroaxis) and database has 62 + 8 testing kits = 70 active rows total.
